Case# TKSmartCardPINFormat.Encoding.binary

iOS 9.0+iPadOS 9.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.11+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
case binary
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardPINFormat/Encoding-swift.enum/binary#Discussion)

Characters are encoded in Binary format (for example, `1234` is encoded as `01h 02h 03h 04h`).
